content.en:
"Not good!"

Hurricane Ancestor panicked.

In terms of strength, they are not the opponent of the Void Whale Overlord, and they can only barely resist the Void Whale Overlord.

But now that the Void Whale Overlord is desperate, he is not an opponent, and ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeforms will definitely be killed in seconds when they encounter the Void Whale Overlord.

"Retreat!"

The Hurricane Ancestor sent a message to the other Ancestors to retreat.

However, the reaction of those Great Ancestors was still a little slower.

Rumble!!!!

The body of the Void Whale Great Ancestor directly smashed several high-level immeasurable lifeforms and many Great Ancestors, and the terrifying power directly killed these Great Ancestors in an instant.

The Hurricane Ancestor immediately stepped forward to stop the Void Whale Ancestor, but was also shot away.

He didn't expect that after the Void Whale Great Ancestor worked hard, his strength would be so terrifying!

Seeing this scene, the other Great Ancestors were frightened, and they didn't dare to stay here, so they fled one by one.

The high-level immeasurable lifeforms that were not part of the Hurricane Pavilion also panicked and fled directly, not daring to cooperate with the Hurricane Pavilion to compete against the Void Whale Overlord.

Before, the Hurricane Pavilion was sure to trap the Void Whale Overlord, so they came here to snatch the Sea Tower Gold.

Now, the Hurricane Pavilion can't trap the Void Whale Overlord, and if they stay any longer, they will be dead.

Everyone is afraid of death, and these high-level immeasurable lifeforms are naturally afraid of death as well.

Although it is difficult for high-level immeasurable lifeforms to be killed, the gap between them and the Void Whale Overlord is too big, and they can't bear a single move at all, and if they don't leave, they will die!

No matter how precious Hailou Tianjin is, there is no life to take it away!

As a large number of Great Ancestors fled, the forces of the Hurricane Pavilion collapsed directly.

Now, the Hurricane Ancestors can only let the Hurricane Pavilion Ancestors flee here, so as not to suffer even more heavy losses.

But from beginning to end, the Hurricane Great Ancestor did not leave here, he was waiting for the process of the Void Whale Overlord's burning blood to end, in this case, the strength of the Void Whale Overlord would be greatly reduced.

At that time, the Hurricane Great Ancestor will be sure to take away the Hailou Tianjin.

But the key question is whether he can hold up until that time.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

One by one, the Great Ancestors who didn't have time to escape all died at the hands of the Void Whale Overlord.

At this moment, many Great Ancestors regretted that they should not have come here, and as a result, they threw their lives here.

And Ye Tian was already on the edge of the battlefield carrying the copy body of Hailou Jin, so he evacuated as soon as he discovered the change, so he did not encounter the attack of the Void Whale Overlord.

And Ye Tian's other replica body is a creature of the Voidless Galaxy, the Void Whale Overlord thinks it is his own subordinates, although he has never seen Ye Tian, but many creatures belonging to the Void Whale Overlord are not qualified to see Ye Tian, and it is normal not to know him.

Therefore, the Void Whale Overlord did not kill Ye Tian.

This caused Ye Tian's two replica bodies to be alive and well here, and witnessed the terrifying combat power of the Void Whale Overlord.

"It is worthy of being an overlord of the Voidless Galaxy, it is said that the strength of the Void Whale Overlord is the lowest among the many overlords of the Voidless Galaxy, I didn't expect the overlords of the countdown to be so terrifying!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

Of course, there are many high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Xuanqi Realm that are more powerful than the Void Whale Overlord or other Overlords of the Voidless Galaxy, but they are still too weak to be qualified to touch them.

Puff!!

The two top-level high-level immeasurable lifeforms that assisted the Hurricane Great Ancestor in stopping the Void Whale Overlord were almost unable to hold on at this moment, and they fled with heavy injuries.

At this time, only Hurricane Ancestor and Ye Tian who spied on the Void Whale Mountain were left in this area.

With the passage of time, the aura of the Void Whale Overlord began to decline, and the Hurricane Great Ancestor's injuries became more and more serious, but the Hurricane Great Ancestor had a lot of life-saving methods, so he couldn't die for a while.

Suddenly.

Hurricane Ancestor couldn't bear it anymore and fled directly.

And the Void Whale Overlord did not give up chasing and killing the Hurricane Ancestor, he knew very well that after his blood burned over, his body was weakened, and the Hurricane Ancestor would inevitably come back at that time.

The confluence period is not over so quickly, so it is necessary to deal with the Hurricane Ancestor, or to hit the Hurricane Ancestor hard, and it will be difficult to recover from it for a long time.

Otherwise, Void Whale Mountain is afraid that it will be dangerous this time, and he will also be in danger.

After the Void Whale Overlord and the Hurricane Great Ancestor left the Void Whale Mountain, Ye Tian began to collect the Hailou Gold and the legacy resources of those Great Ancestors.

As for Hailou Tianjin, Ye Tian looked at the little void whale who was healing from the guardian Hailou Tianjin, so he gave up his plan to seize Hailou Tianjin.

He has the ability to fuse all things, maybe he can also use these Hailou Gold to fuse Hailou Tianjin, if he really does it, then he doesn't need to snatch Hailou Tianjin, as long as he collects Hailou Gold.

At this moment, the Void Whale Mountain suffered heavy losses, and although Ye Tian's behavior aroused the suspicion of many creatures, it did not stop Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian had a problem, he had to wait for the Void Whale Overlord to come back and deal with it!

The creatures here are healing one by one, after all, they also know that this war is not over, so they want to heal and fight again.

"Almost, it's time to go!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If he continues to stay here, his replica body will definitely die, and the resources he has collected will be gone!

So, he prepared to flee.

At this time, a high-level immeasurable lifeform from Void Whale Mountain saw Ye Tian's problem and tried to stop Ye Tian.

However, this high-level immeasurable lifeform creature itself was seriously injured, and it would naturally be easy to deal with other top-level mid-level immeasurable lifeforms, but it couldn't deal with Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!

The two sides exchanged hands in an instant.

Ye Tian directly flew away from that high-level immeasurable lifeform, and immediately quickly escaped, and then in a place in the distance, he handed over all the resources on his body to the body of another copy body, the Nine Patrol Great Ancestor.

However, the two replicating bodies quickly separated.

In this way, as long as the replica body of the Nine Patrol Great Ancestor does not fall, there is no loss.

Ye Tian manipulated the replica body of the Nine Tours Great Ancestor to hide far away, and all kinds of talents to hide the body were used, so that it would not be conspicuous.

After that, he could only wait slowly.

On the other side, the Void Whale Overlord made the Hurricane Ancestor almost on the verge of falling, but in the end, the Hurricane Ancestor escaped, and the Void Whale Overlord's bloodline burning process ended, entered a weak state, and returned to the Void Whale Mountain.

And due to the heavy damage of the Hurricane Great Ancestor, the Hurricane Pavilion suffered heavy losses, so he didn't dare to attack the Void Whale Mountain again for a while, and no one knew if the Void Whale Overlord could fight hard again!

If they can fight hard again, then they are finished!
